_comment: Metadata template for Q-Trial sample_pbc.csv.  Remove underscore keys before use or leave them (they are stripped automatically).
primary_endpoint: Composite of death or liver transplantation, measured from date of trial registration.
study_design: Double-blind randomised placebo-controlled trial (D-penicillamine vs placebo) with parallel observational registry

additional_answers.What does the stage column represent?: Histologic stage of PBC (1-4) per Ludwig criteria.
additional_answers.What is the clinical significance of ede: 0 = no edema, 0.5 = untreated or successfully treated edema, 1 = edema despite diuretic therapy.
additional_answers.Are all 418 patients part of the RCT?: No. 312 participated in the RCT; 106 consented only to observational registry (trt is NA for them).
